entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A salt-sensitive grain legume used in the study for reproductive success analysis under salinity

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: An environmental stressor that negatively impacts the reproductive phase of chickpea

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: The specific stress condition applied to chickpea genotypes to evaluate phenological and transcriptional responses

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE PHASE
entities.description: The growth stage of chickpea that is extremely sensitive to salinity

entities.name: JG11
entities.description: A salt-tolerant genotype of chickpea

entities.name: ICCV2
entities.description: A salt-sensitive genotype of chickpea

entities.name: RNA-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A tool used for comprehensive transcriptome profiling to identify genes and alleles associated with stress

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME PROFILING
entities.description: The process of analyzing the complete set of RNA transcripts to identify stress-related genes

entities.name: DEGS
entities.description: Differentially expressed genes identified in response to salt stress

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: A trait regulated by specific genes that contributes to salt tolerance

entities.name: FLOWERING LOCUS T
entities.description: A gene involved in the regulation of flowering time

entities.name: POLLEN DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A trait regulated by specific genes that contributes to salt tolerance

entities.name: ABORTED MICROSPORES
entities.description: A gene involved in pollen development

entities.name: RHO-GTPASE
entities.description: A gene involved in pollen development

entities.name: POLLEN-RECEPTOR KINASE
entities.description: A gene involved in pollen development

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant genotype to maintain productivity under saline conditions

entities.name: MYB PROTEINS
entities.description: Essential genes that act as regulators of transcriptional responses to salinity tolerance

entities.name: MADS-BOX
entities.description: Essential genes that act as regulators of transcriptional responses to salinity tolerance

entities.name: CHLORIDE ION CHANNEL GENES
entities.description: Essential genes that act as regulators of transcriptional responses to salinity tolerance

entities.name: GENE SET ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify potential candidate genes for crop improvement

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL ANNOTATION
entities.description: A process used to assign biological functions to genes to identify candidates for crop improvement

entities.name: FLOWER DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process in which identified genes play a role for chickpea improvement

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of chickpea cultivars in saline conditions
